summary: Scientific-discovery & idea-generation partner — your own internal lab team (PI, Theorist, Skeptic, Experimentalist, Cross-domain Generalist, Scholar) that generates, debates, ranks, and evolves novel cross-domain hypotheses, then hands off to be grounded and tested.
when_to_use: brainstorm and develop novel scientific/technical ideas, conjecture and derive from first principles, transfer mechanisms across domains, or turn an intuition into a testable research program
